faqLink.title: Looking for Quick Answers?
faqLink.subtitle: Check out our FAQ section for instant answers to common questions

q1.question: How does Multifagro work?
q1.answer: Simply fill out our quick form with your moving details. You'll receive a detailed quote from Multifagro within minutes. Review the pricing and book directly through our platform. It's that easy!

q2.question: Is Multifagro insured?
q2.answer: Yes! Multifagro is fully licensed, insured, and our team members are background-checked. We maintain strict quality standards for all our services.

q3.question: How much does a move cost?
q3.answer: Moving costs vary based on distance, volume, and services needed. We provide transparent pricing upfront so you know exactly what you'll pay. Most local moves range from CHF 300-1,000.

q4.question: Can I get help with packing?
q4.answer: Absolutely! Multifagro offers professional packing services. You can add packing, unpacking, and packing materials when requesting your quote.

q5.question: What if something gets damaged?
q5.answer: Multifagro carries comprehensive insurance. In the rare event of damage, you're fully covered. Simply contact us and we'll help facilitate the process.

q6.question: How far in advance should I book?
q6.answer: We recommend booking 2-4 weeks in advance, especially during peak moving season (summer months). However, we can often accommodate last-minute moves within 48 hours.

q7.question: Do you serve my area?
q7.answer: We currently serve all major cities in Switzerland including Zurich, Geneva, Basel, Bern, Lausanne, and Lucerne. Enter your postcodes to check if we serve your area.

q8.question: Can I reschedule my move?
q8.answer: Yes, we allow rescheduling with adequate notice (usually 48-72 hours). Check our terms and conditions for detailed cancellation policies.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied customers who trusted us with their move

testimonial1.name: Klaus Huber
testimonial1.text: Moving with Multifagro was seamless. The team was professional, punctual, and handled everything with care. Highly recommended!

testimonial2.name: Séverine Moreau
testimonial2.text: I was dreading the move, but Multifagro made it so easy! Got a quote instantly and the service was perfect for my budget.

testimonial3.name: Giovanna Bianchi
testimonial3.text: Excellent service from start to finish. The packing team was meticulous, and nothing was damaged. Best moving experience ever.

testimonial4.name: Dr. Anja Keller
testimonial4.text: Professional, reliable, and affordable. The customer support team was always available to answer my questions. Thank you Multifagro!

factors.title: What Affects Moving Costs?
factors.subtitle: Several factors influence the final price of your move

distance.title: Distance
distance.description: Local moves within the same city are typically less expensive than long-distance relocations.

volume.title: Volume
volume.description: The amount of items and furniture directly affects the truck size and crew needed.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Stairs, elevators, and parking availability can impact the moving time and cost.

services.title: Services
services.description: Additional services like packing, unpacking, and storage add to the total cost.

timing.title: Timing
timing.description: Peak season (summer) and weekend moves may have higher rates than off-peak times.

estimates.title: Estimated Price Ranges
estimates.subtitle: Get an idea of what your move might cost (prices vary by specific details)
estimates.disclaimer: * Prices are estimates and may vary based on specific requirements, distance, and additional services. Get an accurate quote by filling out our form.

cta.title: Ready for Your Exact Quote?
cta.subtitle: Get personalized quotes in minutes — completely free

hero.title: Making Moving Simple
hero.subtitle: We're on a mission to transform the moving experience by providing trusted, professional moving services across Switzerland.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Multifagro was born from a simple observation: moving shouldn't be stressful. After experiencing the challenges of coordinating moves firsthand, our founders realized there had to be a better way.
story.paragraph2: We built Multifagro to be the trusted service that brings transparency, reliability, and peace of mind to every move. By maintaining high standards and providing instant quotes, we've helped thousands of families and businesses relocate with confidence.
story.paragraph3: Today, we're proud to be Switzerland's leading moving service provider, delivering professional moving services across the country. But we're just getting started.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To make every move simple, transparent, and stress-free by connecting people with trusted professionals and innovative tools that streamline the entire relocation process.
